counterfactual_board: The image shows a game-board-style grid.
The image shows a rectangular board grid.
The image shows a board pattern with visible rows, columns, or lines.
The figure shows a board-style grid.
The visual shows a board made from visible grid units.

row_count: How many rows are there on this board?
Count the rows on this board.
How many rows are shown on the board?
What is the row count on this board?
How many board rows are visible?
column_count: How many columns are there on this board?
Count the columns on this board.
How many columns are shown on the board?
What is the column count on this board?
How many board columns are visible?
horizontal_line_count: How many horizontal lines are there on this board?
Count the horizontal lines on this board.
How many horizontal lines are shown on the board?
What is the horizontal-line count on this board?
How many board lines run horizontally?
vertical_line_count: How many vertical lines are there on this board?
Count the vertical lines on this board.
How many vertical lines are shown on the board?
What is the vertical-line count on this board?
How many board lines run vertically?

query:row_count.answer_hint: Set answer to the number of visible board rows.
query:row_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a bbox_set: image-pixel row boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] for all counted rows; bbox-set cardinality equals answer.

query:column_count.answer_hint: Set answer to the number of visible board columns.
query:column_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a bbox_set: image-pixel column boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] for all counted columns; bbox-set cardinality equals answer.

query:horizontal_line_count.answer_hint: Set answer to the number of visible horizontal board lines.
query:horizontal_line_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a segment_set: image-pixel segments [[x1,y1],[x2,y2]] for all counted horizontal lines; segment-set cardinality equals answer.

query:vertical_line_count.answer_hint: Set answer to the number of visible vertical board lines.
query:vertical_line_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a segment_set: image-pixel segments [[x1,y1],[x2,y2]] for all counted vertical lines; segment-set cardinality equals answer.
